label: agent loop • multi-call batch reads then a combining write
query: Read part1.txt, part2.txt, and part3.txt — issue all three file_read calls together in a single response, not one per turn. Then write a file named combined.txt containing the three words in order, separated by single dashes, e.g. word1-word2-word3.
notes: Exercises the parallel batch executor (two-phase approval + concurrent dispatch + serial model-order post-processing) that chat/HTTP run when a model emits several tool calls in one step. A model that ignores the batching instruction still passes the outcome assertions serially — the batch path is exercised opportunistically, which is exactly how production hits it.
